info.name: Social Features API
info.description: Complete API collection for social features including Follow, Message, Rating, Clan, Social Feed, and Privacy systems

request.description: Follow another user. Creates follow relationship or sends follow request for private profiles.
Get list of followers for a user
Get list of users that a user is following
Get follower count for a user
Get following count for a user
Check if current user is following another user
Get pending follow requests for current user
Send a direct message to another user
Get direct messages with another user
Get all conversations for current user
Send a message to clan group chat
Get messages from clan group chat
Rate a user after a match
Check if current user can rate another user for a match
Get average rating for a user
Get rating count for a user
Check if user has trusted player badge
Invite a user to clan (admin only)
Get feed of activities from followed users
Get activities for a specific user
Get like count for an activity
Check if user has liked an activity
Check if current user can view another user's rating
Check if a user is blocked

body.raw:
{
  "email_messages": true,
  "email_follow": true,
  "email_clan_invites": true,
  "email_activity_interactions": true,
  "push_messages": true,
  "push_follow": true,
  "push_clan_invites": true,
  "push_activity_interactions": true
}
